cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve ends up after all those position swaps. I need to track each swap step by step. Let me start by writing down the initial positions. Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So now: - Claire becomes center midfielder (Bob's original position) - Bob becomes right midfielder (Claire's original position) Others remain as they were after the first swap. Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. So Alice, who was fullback, now takes Bob's current position (right midfielder), and Bob takes Alice's original position (fullback). Let me check that again. After second swap, Bob was at right midfielder. So after swapping with Alice, Alice becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes fullback. Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions again. Remember, after first swap, they had swapped once. So swapping back would return them to their original positions? Wait, let me check. After first swap: - Dave was goalkeeper, Eve was left winger. Now swapping again, so Dave becomes left winger again and Eve becomes goalkeeper again? Wait, no. Let me track their positions step by step. After first swap: - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger After second and third swaps, nothing changes for Dave and Eve yet. The fourth swap is Eve and Dave again. So Eve (currently left winger) swaps with Dave (currently goalkeeper). So after this swap: - Eve becomes goalkeeper - Dave becomes left winger. Wait, but Dave's original position was left winger. So after this fourth swap, Dave is back to left winger, but Eve is now goalkeeper again? Wait, no. Because initially, Eve was goalkeeper, then swapped with Dave to become left winger. Then swapping again would put her back to goalkeeper, yes. But the fourth swap is Eve and Dave again. So if Eve is left winger (from first swap) and Dave is goalkeeper (from first swap), swapping again would make Eve goalkeeper and Dave left winger. So yes, they are back to their original positions after the fourth swap. Wait, but what about the third swap? Let me retrace all steps carefully. Let me make a table to track each person's position after each swap. Initial positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper After first swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger After second swap (Claire and Bob): - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger After third swap (Alice and Bob): - Alice: right midfielder (because Bob was there) - Bob: fullback (because Alice was there) - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Fourth swap (Eve and Dave): - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger (back to original) - Eve: goalkeeper (back to original) Fifth swap (Bob and Alice): - Alice: fullback (Bob's current position) - Bob: right midfielder (Alice's current position before swap) - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Wait, let me check that fifth swap again. After third swap, Bob was fullback and Alice was right midfielder. Then fourth swap didn't affect them. So before fifth swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback Fifth swap is Bob and Alice trading. So Alice becomes fullback, Bob becomes right midfielder. So final positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Wait, but the question asks where Eve is playing at the end.
